channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Trump indicates possible visit to Islamabad following potential Iran peace deal
item.description: US President Donald Trump has expressed optimism over a potential agreement with Iran, stating that if a deal is signed in Islamabad, he may personally visit Pakistan. He praised Pakistan's leadership...

item.title: Nigeria: Opportunities for Domain Investment and Potential High Returns
item.description: A concerning report highlights the widespread lack of diagnosis and inadequate treatment for haemophilia in Nigeria, impacting countless individuals and families. The article details the challenges fa...

item.title: Tinubu’s Aide Criticises Atiku’s ARISE TV Interview, Says He Showed No Clear Policy Direction For 2027
item.description: The Special Adviser on Media and Public Communication to President Bola Tinubu, Sunday Dare, don blast former Vice President Atiku Abubakar after his recent interview wey show for ARISE Television. Ac...

item.title: Four paramedics killed in repeated Israeli strikes on rescue teams in southern Lebanon
item.description: Four paramedics have been killed and six others wounded in a series of Israeli airstrikes in southern Lebanon, according to Lebanese authorities, who allege that rescue teams were deliberately targete...

item.title: Pastor Kanyari Explains He Does Not Fight for Custody of His Children with Late Betty Bayo, Highlights Providing School Fees and a KSh 90 Million Mansion
item.description: Following the death of gospel musician Betty Bayo, questions arose about the custody of her two children, Sky and Danny, whom she had with controversial preacher Pastor Victor Kanyari. After her passi...

item.title: Cuba Maintains Preparedness Amidst Rising US-Cuba Tensions
item.description: According to President Miguel Diaz-Canel, Cuba is geared up and prepared for a potential attack from the United States. This stance comes amidst escalating tensions following President Trump's continu...

item.title: Daily Mail's America 250 Power List ranks Donald Trump as the most influential man in the United States
item.description: According to an exclusive poll conducted by JL Partners for Daily Mail+, Donald Trump has been named the most powerful and influential man in America ahead of the nation's 250th anniversary. The surve...

item.title: Tanzania Implements Digital Mineral Licensing System for Increased Efficiency
item.description: Sasa hivi, Tanzania inaingia kwenye mabadiliko makubwa kuhusu jinsi inavyotoa leseni za uchimbaji madini. Serikali imechukua uamuzi wa kutumia mfumo wa digital kabisa, ambao utaautomatisha mchakato mz...

item.title: Alden Richards launches campaign to highlight community heroes
item.description: ABS-CBN celebrity Alden Richards has initiated a project aimed at recognizing and promoting community heroes who make significant contributions to society. Through this advocacy, Richards hopes to ins...

item.title: Cavite Explosion Kills Two
item.description: A tragic incident in Cavite province resulted in the deaths of two individuals following a blast. Authorities are currently investigating the cause of the explosion, which occurred in [Specific Locati...

item.title: Karishma Vijay wins The Apprentice 2026 and secures Lord Sugar’s backing for her beauty brand
item.description: Karishma Vijay, a 28-year-old beauty entrepreneur from Ashford, Surrey, has been crowned the winner of the 2026 edition of BBC’s The Apprentice, triumphing in an all-female final against fellow contes...

item.title: David Geffen Foundation's LA Museum: Architectural Triumph or Environmental Burden?
item.description: The David Geffen Foundation’s new museum complex in Los Angeles, designed by architect Peter Zumthor, has sparked debate regarding its aesthetic achievement versus its substantial environmental impact...

item.title: Ongoing HIV Risks for Children at Taunsa Hospital Due to Poor Practices
item.description: A serious HIV outbreak among children at Taunsa’s main public hospital has raised alarm about ongoing unsafe medical practices. Despite government interventions following the March 2025 crackdown, BBC...

item.title: How to handle a friend who constantly shares disturbing social media content
item.description: In her advice column for The Guardian, Eleanor Gordon-Smith responds to a reader who feels uneasy about a long-time friend who continually sends her disturbing social media videos and conspiracy conte...

item.title: U.S. House blocks resolution to restrict Trump’s authority to conduct military operations against Iran
item.description: The U.S. House of Representatives has rejected a resolution aimed at limiting President Donald Trump’s authority to wage war against Iran, maintaining his broad executive powers nearly six weeks into ...

item.title: High Court Freezes Moi University Accounts After Long-Standing KSh 1 Billion Debt Dispute
item.description: Moi University has suffered another major financial setback after the High Court ordered the freezing of several key accounts due to an overdue construction debt now surpassing KSh 1 billion. The debt...

item.title: Roelf Meyer Appointed as South Africa’s New Ambassador to the United States
item.description: South Africa has named Roelf Meyer, a key negotiator in the country’s transition from apartheid to democracy, as its next ambassador to the United States. Meyer, now 78, was a senior figure in the Nat...

item.title: Philippines Awaits Zaldy Co's Return, Expects Full Disclosure on Flood Control Anomalies
item.description: Following his arrest in Prague, Czech Republic, former House member Elizaldy Co is expected to disclose information regarding alleged anomalies in flood control projects, according to Ako Bicol Party-...

item.title: North Sea Drilling: Why It Won't Solve UK Energy Price Issues
item.description: Calls to increase oil and gas extraction from the North Sea are growing louder amidst rising energy prices and geopolitical tensions, particularly following recent strikes on Tehran and the subsequent...

item.title: Namibian Students Win National Global HackAtom Challenge to Represent Africa in Russia Finals
item.description: Twenty university student teams from Namibia took part in the national round of the Global HackAtom 2026 competition, a 24-hour international challenge designed to promote innovative approaches in nuc...
